Not Fixed (Payout Profit Goals are the profits required between payout requests.)

First Payout: You must make 6% of your initial account balance | Second Payout: You must make 5% on top of your new balance (after the first payout is deducted) | Third Payout (and all future payouts): You must make 4% on top of your new balance (after the previous payout is deducted)
